full_test_suite: excluded: historical tests require removed audit materials or pytest and are not part of the retained unittest closure
dependency_clean_install: UNVERIFIED: the bare temporary venv installation of the torch+cu128 CUDA closure was intentionally stopped before completion; the provisioned table-cu128 runtime has unrelated vLLM server dependency conflicts under pip check.
historical_answer_equivalence: Qwen3 and LLaMA3 historical answer equivalence are retained as separate external behavior evidence; LLaMA3 is not a public release profile.
historical_artifact_comparison: FAIL_RECORDED_SEPARATELY: historical artifact differences do not satisfy RELEASE_ARTIFACT_STRICT_PARITY.
release_artifact_strict_parity: PASS: two independent clean checkouts at evidence commit 075a40cf67a432ff7caea0c87bb985decfd725d6 produced 387/387 predictions each, identical local evaluator metrics, and zero strict comparator differences.
